title: Maxillaria longiloba

The genus Maxillaria is part of the subfamily Maxillarioideae and tribe Maxillarieae. Maxillaria longiloba is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a relatively rare species of orchid, found in the wild in specific areas of its native habitat.
